tool.name: Amazon Bedrock Guardrails
tool.description: Configurable safety layer for filtering, PII handling, hallucination reduction, and policy controls.
tool.pricing: $0.15 per 1K text units after price cut.
tool.logoNotes: Official AWS architecture icon for Amazon Bedrock (`Arch_Amazon-Bedrock_64.svg` from the AWS Architecture Icons pack), intentionally reused for Bedrock Guardrails because AWS currently presents Guardrails as a Bedrock capability rather than with a separate public icon.
tool.practitionerNote: Best fit for Bedrock-centric deployments that want managed prompt/content guardrails close to model invocation instead of a separate governance stack.

dataResidency.detail: Processed in the resource region; FedRAMP High in GovCloud; no sovereign/multi-cloud option.

deployment.detail: Fully managed AWS SaaS; no self-hosted/on-prem option.

auditLogging.detail: Violations to CloudWatch / optional S3; CloudTrail captures API calls.

soc2.detail: Amazon Bedrock in scope for AWS SOC 1/2/3 (Type II).

iso27001.detail: Amazon Bedrock in scope for ISO 27001 (and 27017/27018/27701).

iso42001.detail: Bedrock holds ISO 42001 at the service level; Guardrails sub-feature scope not separately confirmed.

euAiAct.detail: Safety/filtering component; not itself a high-risk AI system.

licenseRisk.detail: Proprietary AWS SaaS; no OSS path.
